lang.select_subtitle: Select your country to get started

auth.tagline: Real food · real kitchens · real people
auth.feature1: Real cooks, real kitchens in your area
auth.feature2: Limited slots — when it sells out, it sells out
auth.consent: By continuing you agree to our
auth.sign_in_sub: Order from real home cooks near you.
auth.sms_note: We'll text a 6-digit code to this number. Standard SMS rates may apply.
auth.otp_note: Didn't receive it? Check that your number is correct and try resending.
auth.otp_error: That code doesn't match. Please try again.
auth.role_subtitle: You can always switch later from your profile.
auth.customer_desc: Order home-cooked meals from cooks near me
auth.cook_desc: Sell meals from my kitchen to my community

onboarding.cravings_sub: Pick 2–3 favourites. We'll personalise your feed.
onboarding.area_later: Set your area later to discover home cooks within 10km.
onboarding.fresh_food: Home-cooked food, made fresh today — not reheated from yesterday.
onboarding.no_cooks: No cooks found yet — check back as more join near you.
onboarding.discover: Discover home cooks, order fresh meals, and support creators in your community.
onboarding.real_people: Real people, real food, real stories

home.rate_prompt: Your review helps more people discover amazing home cooks near them.
home.check_back: Check back soon or explore another section.

discover.title: Discover
discover.hint_sub: Try "jollof", "Lagos", or tap a filter above
discover.try_different: Try a different search or filter

search.find_sub: Search creators, dishes, courses, products, services, weekly menus, stories and posts
search.no_results_body: Try a different search, or explore what's popular right now.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_sub: We'll let you know when something happens with your orders.

orders.title: Your orders
orders.cancelled_note: This order was cancelled. Contact help@foodsbyme.com for queries.
orders.active_hint: When you claim a portion, it shows up here.
orders.past_hint: Your order history will appear here.
orders.review_hint: Tell the cook what you thought (optional)

tracking.title: Tracking your order
tracking.code_hint: Read this code to your rider when they arrive to confirm delivery.
tracking.cash_arrival: in cash to your rider on arrival.
tracking.transfer_arrival: to your rider's number when they arrive.
tracking.refund_soon: You should receive your money back shortly

dispute.title: File a Dispute
dispute.protection_text: Your payment is protected while we investigate. We'll resolve this within 48 hours.
dispute.quality_desc: Food was spoiled or poor quality
dispute.placeholder: e.g. I ordered Jollof Rice with Chicken but received Fried Rice without any protein. The food was also cold on arrival...
dispute.hint: Be specific — include what you ordered vs what you received.
dispute.resolution: Resolution within 48 hours. Both parties will be notified and asked to provide evidence.

checkout.title: Your order
checkout.protected_text: Your payment is held securely. If something goes wrong with your order, we've got you covered.
checkout.delivery_fee: How will you pay the delivery fee?
checkout.cash_desc: Pay in cash when food arrives
checkout.transfer_desc: Send to rider's number on arrival
checkout.tip: Leave a tip for your cook
checkout.note_placeholder: Any special requests or allergies to flag?
checkout.cash_rider: Food secured · pay rider cash or transfer on arrival
checkout.pickup_kitchen: Pick up at the cook's kitchen
checkout.allergen_text: Your order contains ingredients that match your allergen profile:

account.title: Your account
account.sign_in: Sign in to manage your profile, track orders, and access your wallet.
account.allergen_note: Cooks are shown a warning when their dish matches your allergens.
account.health_note: Health Kitchen creators can tailor meal plans to your conditions when you subscribe.
account.register_cook_sub: Start selling home-cooked meals to your community
account.back_kitchen_sub: Manage your menu, orders and earnings
account.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

bookings.title: Event bookings
bookings.hire: Hire a cook for your event
bookings.hire_sub: Birthday, wedding, corporate dinner, intimate gathering — browse cooks who cater for private events and send a direct enquiry.
bookings.find_desc: Browse profiles + tap "Hire for an event"
bookings.quote_desc: Cook reviews your brief and sends a price
bookings.deposit_desc: Secure your date with a deposit
bookings.no_bookings_body: Your event enquiries will appear here once you send one.

cook_home.add_hint: Add a meal to start taking orders today.
cook_home.kitchen_live: Kitchen is Live — Tap to go offline
cook_home.first_review: Your first review appears here once a customer rates their order.
cook_home.milestone_msg: A huge milestone. Your customers love you. Keep going.
cook_home.insights_later: Your insights will appear as you grow.

cook_orders.title: Orders
cook_orders.otp_sub: Riders scan OTPs to pick up and deliver orders
cook_orders.inbox_hint: Private chef bookings, custom requests and bulk orders are managed in your Inbox tab.
cook_orders.live_hint: You're live — orders from customers will appear here.
cook_orders.offline_hint: Go live to start receiving orders from nearby customers.
cook_orders.completed_hint: Orders you've delivered will appear here.

cook_earnings.title: Earnings
cook_earnings.account_hint: As it appears on your bank statement
cook_earnings.bank_security: Your bank details are encrypted and only used for payouts.
cook_earnings.bank_saved: Bank account saved. You can now request payouts.
cook_earnings.payout_done: Your payout has been requested. It will arrive within 1 business day.

cook_menu.title: My menu
cook_menu.empty_hint: Your menu is empty. Add your first dish and customers will be able to order from you today.
cook_menu.limited: Limited time offer — come get it!

cook_enquiries.title: Enquiries
cook_enquiries.share_hint: Share your profile so customers can send you enquiries.

cook_settings.title: Chef Service Settings
cook_settings.equipment_hint: List equipment you require (knives, blender, stand mixer…)
cook_settings.kitchen_hint: Minimum kitchen spec (oven, gas burners, prep space…)

cook_profile.first_story: Share a story that disappears after 24 hours
cook_profile.reviews_note: Reviews from customers will appear here

analytics.title: Creator Insights
analytics.no_data_body: Analytics build up as you take orders and engage with customers.
analytics.insight_default: Your personalised insights will appear here.
analytics.insight_start: Start taking orders to unlock your personalised insights.
analytics.no_revenue_body: Revenue analytics will appear after your first order.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.intro: Upload your food safety and business documents. Our team reviews each submission within 3-5 business days.
certifications.food_safety_desc: NAFDAC, HACCP, or local food safety cert
certifications.health_desc: Certificate from a licensed health authority
certifications.culinary_desc: Professional culinary school or chef certificate
certifications.nafdac_desc: NAFDAC product registration or facility approval
certifications.permit_desc: Any government-issued kitchen or food handling permit
certifications.submitted_ok: Your document is under review. We will notify you within 3-5 business days.
